changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-lsp/src/supervisor.rs (28.8% coverage, 17/59 lines)

Uncovered functions:
- spawn_all() - starts all configured LSP daemons (lines 50-65)
- shutdown_all() - graceful shutdown of all daemons (lines 70-90)
- health_check() - checks all daemons and restarts failed ones (lines 98-136)
- restart_daemon() - restart a specific daemon by name (lines 149-150)

The supervisor orchestrates multiple LspDaemon instances. Tests can use mock daemon specs with nonexistent binaries to test error handling, or create integration tests with a real LSP server."
